name: ios-senior-review
description: Comprehensive iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / tvOS / visionOS code review by an Opus 4.6 agent that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team AND a senior Apple platform engineer. Reviews 12 dimensions across 4 tiers (App Store rejection risk, privacy, entitlements, security, HIG, accessibility, SwiftUI/UIKit patterns, deep linking & extensions, Swift quality, concurrency safety, performance & memory, platform integration). Returns evidence-tagged findings with submission and engineering verdicts.
